moments.title: World Cup 2026: Spain Champions!
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 concluded on July 19th, with Spain defeating Argentina 1-0 after extra time in a thrilling final in New Jersey, while England secured third place.

angles.name: Final Match Buzz
angles.copy: Did you recover from the World Cup final yet? Spain lifted the trophy after a nail-biting 1-0 win over Argentina! What a tournament it was.

angles.name: England's Performance
angles.copy: While it wasn't the final, England's 3rd place finish at the World Cup 2026 is their best since '66! A fantastic campaign for the Three Lions.

angles.name: Tournament Highlights
angles.copy: Five days on, what's your standout memory from the 2026 World Cup? From Spain's historic win to England's bronze, it had it all!

moments.title: Love Island UK 2026 Final Approaches
moments.blurb: The Love Island UK 2026 series is set to conclude with its grand finale on Monday, July 27th, at 9 PM on ITV2 and ITVX, with host Maya Jama hinting at a 'different format' for the end.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is ON! The Love Island UK 2026 final is just days away on Monday. Who are you rooting for to take the crown?

angles.name: Finale Twist
angles.copy: Maya Jama's teased a 'different format' for the Love Island UK finale on Monday! What surprises do you think ITV has in store?

angles.name: Last Couple Standing
angles.copy: After weeks of drama and romance, one couple will be crowned Love Island UK champions on Monday night. Who deserves to win the £50k?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jennifer Lopez!
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday today, July 24th.

angles.name: JLo's 57th
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only J.Lo! Still slaying the charts and the screen. What's your favourite Jennifer Lopez track?

angles.name: Dance Anthem Queen
angles.copy: From 'On The Floor' to 'Get Right', Jennifer Lopez turns 57 today! Get your dance anthems ready to celebrate the queen of pop.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger!
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on Saturday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: He's still got the moves! Happy 83rd Birthday to the iconic Mick Jagger this Saturday. What's your favourite Stones classic?

angles.name: 83 Years Young
angles.copy: The one and only Mick Jagger turns 83 on Saturday! Still rocking stages worldwide. Celebrate his birthday with us!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Maureen McGovern!
moments.blurb: American singer and Broadway actress Maureen McGovern, known for hits like 'The Morning After', turns 77 on Sunday, July 27th.

angles.name: 70s Songbird
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th Birthday to the incredible Maureen McGovern this Sunday! Her voice gave us 'The Morning After' and so much more.

angles.name: Classic Hits Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrate Maureen McGovern's 77th birthday this Sunday with her timeless hits! Which one takes you back?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Cher Lloyd!
moments.blurb: English singer and X Factor star Cher Lloyd, known for 'Swagger Jagger' and 'Want U Back', turns 33 on Monday, July 28th.

angles.name: X Factor Star
angles.copy: Remember Cher Lloyd from X Factor? She turns 33 on Monday! Still loving 'Swagger Jagger' and 'Want U Back'.

angles.name: Pop Throwback
angles.copy: Monday is Cher Lloyd's 33rd birthday! Throwing it back to her early hits that dominated the airwaves.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Afroman!
moments.blurb: American rapper Afroman, famous for his Grammy-nominated hit 'Because I Got High', turns 52 on Monday, July 28th.

angles.name: Hip Hop Birthday
angles.copy: Because he got high... and turned 52! Happy Birthday to Afroman this Monday. What a track!

angles.name: 00s Throwback
angles.copy: Monday marks Afroman's 52nd birthday! Time to play his iconic 2000s hit.

moments.title: Happy Birthday James Hetfield!
moments.blurb: Metallica's legendary frontman, James Hetfield, will celebrate his 63rd birthday on Sunday, August 3rd.

angles.name: Metal Legend
angles.copy: Heavy metal icon James Hetfield turns 63 this Sunday! Raise your horns for Metallica's frontman.

angles.name: Metallica's Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating James Hetfield's 63rd birthday this Sunday! What's your ultimate Metallica anthem?

moments.title: UK Summer Holidays in Full Swing
moments.blurb: Across the UK, school summer holidays are well underway, offering a prime time for family breaks and activities.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially in full swing across the UK! What are your plans for soaking up the sun and making memories?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Keeping the kids entertained this summer? We're loving seeing all your holiday adventures!

angles.name: Local Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Devon, the summer holidays are here! What local spots are you enjoying with the family this week?
